SURREPLY MEMO OF P&A IN OPPOS TO MOTION TO ENFORCE CHARGING ORDER FILED BY RESPONDENT RICKS, BRUCE INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CAPITAL SOLUTIONS
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-20-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE CHARGING ORDER IS DENIED. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS BASED PRINCIPALLY ON THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL, IN THAT THE APPELLATE DECISION MODIFIED THE TRIAL COURT JUDGMENT FROM AN AWARD OF DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFFS AS INDIVIDUALS, TO AN AWARD TO THE PARTNERSHIP. THE TENTATIVE RULING DOES NOT ADDRESS THE CLAIM THAT THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN RELEASED BY AGREEMENT. IF EITHER PARTY WISHES TO PRESENT ARGUMENT, THE MOTION WILL BE CONTINUED TO MONDAY, MARCH 23, 2009 AT 10:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 610, FOR HEARING-DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF THE COURT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.
SUMMONS ISSUED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Charging Order
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiffs' Motion To Enforce Charging Order is denied. The tentative ruling is based principally on the judgment on appeal, in that the appellate decision modified the trial court judgment from an award of damages to plaintiffs as individuals, to an award to the partnership. The tentative ruling does not address the claim that the judgment has been released by agreement. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Charging Order
Off Calendar Mar-20-2009 Continued To Mar-23-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to enforce charging order is denied. The tentative ruling is based principally on the judgment on appeal, in that the appellate decision modified the trial court judgment from an award of damages to plaintiffs as individuals, to an award to the partnership. The tentative ruling does not address the claim that the judgment has been released by agreement. If either party wishes to present argument, the motion will be continued to Monday, March 23, 2009 at 10:30 a.m. in Department 610, for hearing-due to the unavailability of the Court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported. (610/PS)
